mapper.insert: insert into notice_tbl values ( notice_seq.nextval, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, sysdate, 0, #{noticePublic}, #{noticeFixed}, #{noticeCategory}, #{noticeImagePath} )
mapper.select: select notice_no, notice_public, notice_fixed, notice_title, notice_content, notice_date, notice_category, notice_image_path from notice_tbl order by notice_fixed desc, notice_date desc
mapper.update: update notice_tbl set notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_content = #{noticeContent}, notice_public = #{noticePublic}, notice_fixed = #{noticeFixed}, notice_category = #{noticeCategory}, notice_image_path = #{noticeImagePath} where notice_no = #{noticeNo}
mapper.select: select -- 전체 회원 수 (select count(*) from member_tbl1) as totalMember, -- 이번달 가입자 (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = trunc(sysdate, 'MM') then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as thisMonthMember, -- 지난달 가입자 (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date, 'MM') = add_months(trunc(sysdate, 'MM'), -1) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as lastMonthMember, -- 오늘 가입자 (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as todayMember, -- 어제 가입자 (select count (case when trunc(enroll_date) = trunc(sysdate - 1) then 1 end) from member_tbl1) as yesterdayMember, -- 신고 카테고리별 건수 (select count(case when report_category = '광고' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as ad, (select count(case when report_category = '욕설' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as hate, (select count(case when report_category = '스팸' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as spam, (select count(case when report_category = '기타' then 1 end) from board_report_tbl) as etc, -- 미처리 신고 (status = 0) (select count(*) from board_report_tbl where report_status = 0) as pendingReport, -- 주간 가입자 추이 (4주 전부터 1주 전까지) (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -28 and enroll_date < sysdate - 21) as fourWeekAgo, (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -21 and enroll_date < sysdate - 14) as threeWeekAgo, (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -14 and enroll_date < sysdate - 7) as twoWeekAgo, (select count(*) from member_tbl1 where enroll_date >= sysdate -7) as oneWeekAgo from dual
select faq_no, faq_title, faq_content, faq_category from faq_tbl

select qna_no, member_id, qna_title, qna_content, qna_status, qna_date, qna_category, qna_question_image from qna_tbl order by qna_status asc, qna_date desc OFFSET #{page} * #{size} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: update qna_tbl set qna_answer = #{qnaAnswer}, qna_answer_image = #{qnaAnswerImage}, qna_status = 1 where qna_no = #{qnaNo}
mapper.select: select count(case when log_action = '로그인실패' then 1 end) as "failCount", count(case when log_alert = '위치변경' then 1 end) as "locationChangeCount" from member_log_tbl where member_id = #{memberId} and log_time >= sysdate - 1

select b.board_no, b.writer_id, b.board_title, to_char(b.board_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as boardDate, b.board_status, (select count(*) from board_report_tbl r where r.board_no = b.board_no) as reportCount from board_tbl b order by b.board_date desc
